repair_history.diagnosis:
line 17: Couldn't resolve reference to 'SM'.: SM is a subcomponent, not a visible port or constant in the component type scope -> Replace 'SM' with a valid expression using only visible symbols
line 17: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'int' and '<error>', but must be of the same type: Invalid comparison between incompatible types due to unresolved SM reference -> Replace the entire equality expression with a valid boolean expression using only visible symbols
line 17: named thing must be an expression with a type: Invalid expression due to unresolved SM reference -> Replace the entire equality expression with a valid boolean expression using only visible symbols
line 19: Couldn't resolve reference to 'abs'.: abs function not available in current context -> Replace abs with a valid expression or remove the constraint
line 19: Couldn't resolve reference to 'val'.: val attribute not accessible on Actual_Speed in this context -> Replace Actual_Speed.val with a valid expression using only visible symbols

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 33: 'Actual' and 'Actual_Speed' have incompatible classifiers.: THROT.Actual is an internal subcomponent port not visible in component type contract; AGREE cannot reference it directly. -> Remove the assumption/guarantee clauses that reference THROT.Actual; only use visible ports: Target_Speed, Actual_Speed, Target_Tire_Pitch, Actual_Tire_Pitch, State_Signal.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 35: The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.: CNTRL.Target is an internal subcomponent port; AGREE cannot compare Target_Speed (component port) to CNTRL.Target (subcomponent port) in a component type contract. -> Remove the guarantee 'speed_limit' that implicitly relies on CNTRL.Target; replace with direct relation between visible ports: Actual_Speed and Target_Speed.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 40: 'State_Out' and 'State_Signal' have incompatible classifiers.: SM.State_Out is an internal subcomponent port; AGREE cannot reference it in component type annex; State_Signal is the only visible representation. -> Replace 'State_Signal.val = 1' with a direct assumption on State_Signal as visible; remove dependency on SM.State_Out.

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 29: 'Actual' and 'Actual_Speed' have incompatible classifiers.: AGREE annex references Actual_Speed, but validator detects a type mismatch from subcomponent port THROT.Actual; this implies the annex is being evaluated in a context where subcomponent port visibility is incorrectly assumed. -> Remove any implicit reliance on THROT.Actual; keep only visible component ports: Target_Speed, Actual_Speed, Target_Tire_Pitch, Actual_Tire_Pitch, State_Signal.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 31: The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.: AGREE annex uses Target_Speed, but validator detects a type mismatch with CNTRL.Target — implying the annex is being evaluated over subcomponent ports not visible at component type level. -> Keep only Target_Speed as visible input; do not reference CNTRL.Target in component type annex.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 36: 'State_Out' and 'State_Signal' have incompatible classifiers.: AGREE annex references State_Signal, but validator detects a type mismatch from SM.State_Out — indicating the annex is being evaluated over an implementation-only subcomponent port. -> Keep only State_Signal as visible output; do not reference SM.State_Out in component type annex.

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 29: 'Actual' and 'Actual_Speed' have incompatible classifiers.: AGREE annex references subcomponent port 'Actual' instead of visible component port 'Actual_Speed' -> Replace 'Actual' with 'Actual_Speed' in the assume/guarantee expressions
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 31: The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.: AGREE annex references subcomponent port 'Target' instead of visible component port 'Target_Speed' -> Replace 'Target' with 'Target_Speed' in the assume/guarantee expressions
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 36: 'State_Out' and 'State_Signal' have incompatible classifiers.: AGREE annex references subcomponent port 'State_Out' instead of visible component port 'State_Signal' -> Replace 'State_Out' with 'State_Signal' in the assume/guarantee expressions

left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'Types::state_sig.impl' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in equality comparison between opaque type and integer -> Replace State_Signal = 0 or State_Signal = 1 with a boolean variable that represents the valid states
left side of binary expression '<=' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type'int' or 'real': Invalid comparison between opaque type and real type -> Remove or rewrite the speed limit guarantee to use valid comparable types
right side of binary expression '<=' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type'int' or 'real': Invalid comparison between opaque type and real type -> Remove or rewrite the speed limit guarantee to use valid comparable types
